_comment_1: Phase-8 Session 5 (S1): signal stacking vote thresholds. 2026-04-22 revert (Audit-O strategy-fixes): min_votes lowered 2→1 because current strategy mix only produces 1-2 active signal families per cycle, so a 2-vote quorum starves the router. Raise back to 2 when more strategy families (intraday + crypto + reversion) are consistently firing. window_seconds extended 60→300 so the 5-minute rolling window is ready for re-raising when quorum is viable.
_comment_2: window_seconds is the rolling window within which distinct signal_family submissions count toward quorum. Votes older than this age are discarded.
